name: 13 White Label Social Media Management Software for Agencies
header_text: 13 White Label Social Media Management Software for Agencies
description:
Social media management software helps you manage multiple social media accounts with minimal effort. However, many heap all their users into the same box, but some allow you to own the entire process. With White-label social media management software solutions, agencies can make the social media management process their own, customizing every aspect in line with their brand guidelines and visual identity. 

Certain white-label tools go above and beyond in providing customization options. We’ve shortlisted 13 of them. These best white-label social media management solutions stand out with their capabilities and overall benefits. They can help raise your clients’ satisfaction to new heights. 

Ready to explore these platforms in detail?

How to choose the best white-label social media management software?

Choosing a new software solution can be tricky, especially if you’re a first-timer. There is much to consider, given your agency’s unique needs.

Here are tips to help you evaluate your options: 

1. Supported Platform

Confirm that the white-label social media software is compatible with your social platforms and management toolbox.

2. AI automation

Evaluate the level of automation offered. Ensure that the platform's automation (and AI features) meets your unique needs, whether it's for content generation, post analytics, or client communication.

3. Integrations

Evaluate the ability to integrate with your apps, analytics tools, and other tools in your ecosystem.

4. Reselling support for agencies

Ensure the platform allows you to resell advanced, fully brandable social media solutions to your customers. This makes your brand more visible and recognizable, inspiring more loyalty among your audience.

5. Managed services

If you need any hands-on assistance with any aspect of your social media management processes, consider platforms that offer managed services.

6. Content Planning features

It is critical to evaluate content-planning features. After all, content creation is a huge part of social media management. Some platforms help you manage content from end to end, generating ideas, scheduling and posting content automatically, etc.

7. Robust Analytics and Reporting

Ensure the white-label social media management software equips you with robust analytics and reporting tools. Check for tools that track key parameters and measure the performance of your social media campaigns.
